resultList.dtldesc: Discover refined urban living in this beautifully furnished 2 BHK apartment at Hallmark Empyrean, Puppalaguda, Hyderabad. Combining modern design with a peaceful residential setting, this home is an excellent choice for families and investors seeking comfort, convenience, and strong connectivity in a rapidly developing neighbourhood. Property Specifications This well-planned 2 BHK apartment offers a super built-up area of 1319 sq-ft, delivering a spacious and efficient layout ideal for contemporary living. Positioned on the 3rd floor of a 5-storey building, the residence enjoys ample natural light along with pleasant views of the landscaped gardenpark. The apartment is fully furnished and features two comfortable bedrooms and two well-appointed bathrooms, ensuring a practical and comfortable lifestyle. Two balconies further enhance ventilation and provide relaxing outdoor spaces. The living and dining areas are thoughtfully separated, creating a more organised and functional interior layout. A modular kitchen with chimney and piped gas connection adds to everyday convenience, while vitrified flooring throughout the home ensures durability and a clean, elegant finish. The property is west-facing and Vastu compliant, making it suitable for harmonious living. Additionally, a dedicated puja room enhances the cultural and functional appeal of the home. Facilities Residents benefit from a range of modern amenities designed to support a secure and hassle-free lifestyle. The property offers 24-hour water supply and reliable electricity with minimal power interruptions. Essential features include power backup, reserved parking, and round-the-clock security with CCTV surveillance. The apartment comes with the rare advantage of two covered parking spaces, catering well to multi-vehicle households. The building is equipped with two lifts for smooth accessibility, and the well-maintained surroundings reflect the quality of the development.
